data.name: Lorelei and the Laser Eyes
data.detailed_description:
A woman, summoned by an eccentric man to participate in a project in an old hotel somewhere in central Europe, becomes embroiled in a game of illusions, increasingly dangerous and surreal.

Now you are invited to fall into the same rabbit hole, in a non-linear mystery with an immense amount of handcrafted puzzles, constantly presenting you with new riddles to solve, each leading you closer to deciphering the enigma of Lorelei and the Laser Eyes.
data.about_the_game:
A woman, summoned by an eccentric man to participate in a project in an old hotel somewhere in central Europe, becomes embroiled in a game of illusions, increasingly dangerous and surreal.

Now you are invited to fall into the same rabbit hole, in a non-linear mystery with an immense amount of handcrafted puzzles, constantly presenting you with new riddles to solve, each leading you closer to deciphering the enigma of Lorelei and the Laser Eyes.
data.short_description: The stage is set. Imagine an old baroque manor, perhaps a hotel or a museum, somewhere in central Europe. A woman wanders in search of answers.
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
data.reviews:
“...one of the most compelling games I’ve played in years.”
10/10 – Inverse

“...a puzzle game that is just as intelligently and thoughtfully designed as it is atmospheric and fascinating, and I can’t recommend it enough.”
5/5 – TheGamer

“...a must-play puzzle game and one of the genre's best.”
5/5 – GameRant

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-540 or AMD Phenom II X4 965
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 8800 GT, 512 MB or AMD Radeon HD 5670, 2GB or Intel HD Graphics 4600
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: If playing on Steam Deck, there's a small issue with line rendering not being pixel perfect in the latest revisions of Proton. Proton 7 is verified to work as intended.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-650 or AMD FX-4350
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GT 730, 2 GB or AMD Radeon R7 240, 2 GB or Intel iris XE Graphics
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: If playing on Steam Deck, there's a small issue with line rendering not being pixel perfect in the latest revisions of Proton. Proton 7 is verified to work as intended.
